narrative: BoJ Deputy Governor Himino warns that delaying rate hikes could cause long-term economic damage, lifting JPY as USD/JPY retreats to 161.28; gold lower -1.52%; equities +1.08%; DXY +0.07%; VIX 16.4. USD leads G10 (+1.206% avg) as US-Iran initial peace agreement eases geopolitical risk, while the Fed-BoJ 275bp carry spread sustains the primary USD/JPY anchor. USD/JPY options show a moderate put skew with 25d RR at -1.08, while IV at 7.2% vs HV30 2.4% signals a 4.8pt volatility risk premium. Watch SNB and BoE rate decisions today at 07:30 and 11:00 UTC.
